# AgentLayer

AgentLayer is a wallet and finance layer for agents.

Primary LLM entrypoints:

- https://www.agent-layer.tech/for-llms/
- https://www.agent-layer.tech/skill.md
- https://www.agent-layer.tech/mcp/
- https://www.agent-layer.tech/wallet/

Install commands:

- OpenClaw: `npx @agentlayer.tech/wallet install --yes`
- Claude Code: `npx @agentlayer.tech/wallet install --yes && npx @agentlayer.tech/wallet claude-code install --yes`
- Codex: `npx @agentlayer.tech/wallet install --yes && npx @agentlayer.tech/wallet codex install --yes`

Public MCP endpoint:

- `https://agent-layer-production-852f.up.railway.app/mcp`

Useful links:

- Docs: https://docs.agent-layer.tech
- GitHub: https://github.com/lopushok9/Agent-Layer
- Blog: https://x.com/agentlayer_ai
